channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
Common Walking Mistakes (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: Walking is a nearly perfect, low-impact exercise. But the wrong shoes, pace, or routine can sideline your progress fast -- and may even lead to injury...

item.title: 11 Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels Naturally
AI's 'Blind Trust' Problem Puts Patients at Risk
item.description: Panelists at HLTH Europe 2026 warned that clinicians and patients are increasingly deferring to algorithmic outputs over independent judgment. Medscap...
